title: Add AI Features to an Existing Next.js App
description: Production-ready AI integration: OpenAI API with streaming, rate limiting via Upstash Redis, async job processing via Inngest, and structured output validation with Zod.

steps.description: Integrate OpenAI API with streaming chat completions and function calling
Add Upstash Redis for rate limiting AI requests and caching repeated prompts
Validate structured AI outputs (JSON mode responses) with Zod schemas
Offload slow AI jobs (document processing, batch inference) to Inngest background functions
